concepts.finding: Both phrase-based and neural unsupervised MT benefit from careful initialization (cross-lingual embeddings), denoising language models, and iterative back-translation, achieving 28.1 BLEU on WMT En-Fr.
concepts.implication: Key ingredients for unsupervised cross-lingual transfer: good initialization + denoising + self-training, a pattern that transfers to unsupervised query understanding tasks.
concepts.open_question: Which of these three ingredients is most critical for unsupervised query understanding?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Self-training via iterative back-translation will provide the largest marginal gain (+8% F1) for unsupervised query intent classification.
